mapper.select: SELECT rt.accommodation_id, a.name AS accommodation_name, rt.room_type_id, rt.name AS room_type_name, rt.base_price FROM room_types rt JOIN accommodations a ON a.accommodation_id = rt.accommodation_id WHERE rt.status = 'ACTIVE' AND a.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY a.name, rt.room_type_id

SELECT a.accommodation_id, a.name AS accommodation_name, a.region, a.address, a.info_text, a.check_in_time, a.check_out_time, rt.room_type_id, rt.name AS room_type_name, rt.base_capacity, rt.max_capacity, rt.base_price, r.room_id FROM accommodations a JOIN room_types rt ON rt.accommodation_id = a.accommodation_id JOIN rooms r ON r.room_type_id = rt.room_type_id WHERE a.status = 'ACTIVE' AND rt.status = 'ACTIVE' AND r.status = 'ACTIVE' AND ( #{region} IS NULL OR #{region} = '' OR a.region = #{region} ) ORDER BY a.name, rt.room_type_id, r.room_id

SELECT a.accommodation_id, a.name AS accommodation_name, a.region, a.address, a.info_text, a.check_in_time, a.check_out_time, rt.room_type_id, rt.name AS room_type_name, rt.base_capacity, rt.max_capacity, rt.base_price, r.room_id FROM accommodations a JOIN room_types rt ON rt.accommodation_id = a.accommodation_id JOIN rooms r ON r.room_type_id = rt.room_type_id WHERE a.accommodation_id = #{accommodationId} AND a.status = 'ACTIVE' AND rt.status = 'ACTIVE' AND r.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY rt.room_type_id, r.room_id

SELECT r.room_id, r.accommodation_id, r.room_code, r.room_type_id, rt.name AS room_type_name FROM rooms r JOIN room_types rt ON rt.room_type_id = r.room_type_id JOIN accommodations a ON a.accommodation_id = r.accommodation_id WHERE r.accommodation_id = #{accommodationId} AND r.status = 'ACTIVE' AND rt.status = 'ACTIVE' AND a.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY r.room_type_id, r.room_id

SELECT rv.reservation_id, rv.reservation_no, rv.accommodation_id, a.name AS accommodation_name, rv.room_type_id, rt.name AS room_type_name, rv.guest_count, rv.check_in_date, rv.check_out_date, rv.status, rv.requested_at, rv.confirmed_at, rv.cancelled_at FROM reservations rv JOIN accommodations a ON a.accommodation_id = rv.accommodation_id JOIN room_types rt ON rt.room_type_id = rv.room_type_id WHERE rv.guest_user_id = #{guestUserId} ORDER BY rv.requested_at DESC, rv.reservation_id DESC

SELECT rv.reservation_id, rv.reservation_no, rv.accommodation_id, a.name AS accommodation_name, a.region AS accommodation_region, a.address AS accommodation_address, a.check_in_time AS accommodation_check_in_time, rv.room_type_id, rt.name AS room_type_name, rv.guest_count, rv.check_in_date, rv.check_out_date, rv.status, rv.requested_at, rv.confirmed_at, rv.cancelled_at FROM reservations rv JOIN accommodations a ON a.accommodation_id = rv.accommodation_id JOIN room_types rt ON rt.room_type_id = rv.room_type_id WHERE rv.reservation_id = #{reservationId} AND rv.guest_user_id = #{guestUserId}

SELECT rv.reservation_id, rv.reservation_no, rv.status, rv.check_in_date, a.check_in_time FROM reservations rv JOIN accommodations a ON a.accommodation_id = rv.accommodation_id WHERE rv.reservation_id = #{reservationId} AND rv.guest_user_id = #{guestUserId} FOR UPDATE
SELECT rn.reservation_night_id, rn.stay_date FROM reservation_nights rn WHERE rn.reservation_id = #{reservationId} ORDER BY rn.stay_date ASC, rn.reservation_night_id ASC

SELECT rsh.history_id, rsh.from_status, rsh.to_status, rsh.action_type, rsh.reason_type, rsh.reason_text, rsh.changed_at FROM reservation_status_history rsh WHERE rsh.reservation_id = #{reservationId} ORDER BY rsh.changed_at ASC, rsh.history_id ASC

SELECT rv.reservation_id, rv.reservation_no, rv.guest_user_id, u.login_id AS guest_login_id, u.name AS guest_name, rv.accommodation_id, a.name AS accommodation_name, rv.room_type_id, rt.name AS room_type_name, rv.guest_count, rv.check_in_date, rv.check_out_date, rv.status, rv.requested_at FROM reservations rv JOIN users u ON u.user_id = rv.guest_user_id JOIN accommodations a ON a.accommodation_id = rv.accommodation_id JOIN room_types rt ON rt.room_type_id = rv.room_type_id WHERE rv.status = 'PENDING' AND a.host_user_id = #{hostUserId} ORDER BY rv.requested_at ASC, rv.reservation_id ASC

SELECT rv.reservation_id, rv.reservation_no, rv.guest_user_id, u.login_id AS guest_login_id, u.name AS guest_name, rv.accommodation_id, a.name AS accommodation_name, rv.room_type_id, rt.name AS room_type_name, rv.check_in_date, rv.check_out_date, rv.status, rv.requested_at, rv.confirmed_at, rv.cancelled_at, CASE WHEN rv.status IN ('PENDING', 'CONFIRMED') AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM reservation_nights rn WHERE rn.reservation_id = rv.reservation_id AND rn.stay_date >= #{currentDate} ) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS reassignment_possible, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM room_blocks rb JOIN rooms br ON br.room_id = rb.room_id WHERE br.accommodation_id = rv.accommodation_id AND rb.status = 'ACTIVE' AND rb.start_date < rv.check_out_date AND rb.end_date >= rv.check_in_date ) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS has_relevant_blocks, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM price_policies pp WHERE pp.accommodation_id = rv.accommodation_id AND pp.room_type_id = rv.room_type_id AND pp.status = 'ACTIVE' AND pp.start_date < rv.check_out_date AND pp.end_date >= rv.check_in_date ) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS has_relevant_pricing FROM reservations rv JOIN users u ON u.user_id = rv.guest_user_id JOIN accommodations a ON a.accommodation_id = rv.accommodation_id JOIN room_types rt ON rt.room_type_id = rv.room_type_id WHERE rv.status IN ('PENDING', 'CONFIRMED', 'CANCELLED') AND (#{isAdmin} = TRUE OR a.host_user_id = #{hostUserId}) AND ( #{status} IS NULL OR rv.status = #{status} ) ORDER BY rv.requested_at DESC, rv.reservation_id DESC

SELECT rv.reservation_id, rv.reservation_no, rv.guest_user_id, u.login_id AS guest_login_id, u.name AS guest_name, rv.accommodation_id, a.name AS accommodation_name, rv.room_type_id, rt.name AS room_type_name, rv.guest_count, rv.check_in_date, rv.check_out_date, rv.status, rv.requested_at, rv.confirmed_at, rv.cancelled_at, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM reservation_nights rn WHERE rn.reservation_id = rv.reservation_id AND rn.stay_date >= #{currentDate} ) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS reassignment_possible, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM room_blocks rb JOIN rooms br ON br.room_id = rb.room_id WHERE br.accommodation_id = rv.accommodation_id AND rb.status = 'ACTIVE' AND rb.start_date < rv.check_out_date AND rb.end_date >= rv.check_in_date ) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS has_relevant_blocks, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM price_policies pp WHERE pp.accommodation_id = rv.accommodation_id AND pp.room_type_id = rv.room_type_id AND pp.status = 'ACTIVE' AND pp.start_date < rv.check_out_date AND pp.end_date >= rv.check_in_date ) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS has_relevant_pricing FROM reservations rv JOIN users u ON u.user_id = rv.guest_user_id JOIN accommodations a ON a.accommodation_id = rv.accommodation_id JOIN room_types rt ON rt.room_type_id = rv.room_type_id WHERE rv.status IN ('PENDING', 'CONFIRMED') AND rv.accommodation_id = #{accommodationId} AND (#{isAdmin} = TRUE OR a.host_user_id = #{hostUserId}) AND rv.check_in_date < #{endDate} AND rv.check_out_date > #{startDate} ORDER BY CASE WHEN rv.status = 'PENDING' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC, rv.check_in_date ASC, rv.requested_at ASC, rv.reservation_id ASC

SELECT rv.reservation_id, rv.reservation_no, rv.guest_user_id, u.login_id AS guest_login_id, u.name AS guest_name, rv.accommodation_id, a.name AS accommodation_name, a.region AS accommodation_region, a.address AS accommodation_address, a.check_in_time AS accommodation_check_in_time, a.check_out_time AS accommodation_check_out_time, rv.room_type_id, rt.name AS room_type_name, rv.guest_count, a.host_user_id, rv.check_in_date, rv.check_out_date, rv.status, rv.requested_at, rv.confirmed_at, rv.cancelled_at FROM reservations rv JOIN users u ON u.user_id = rv.guest_user_id JOIN accommodations a ON a.accommodation_id = rv.accommodation_id JOIN room_types rt ON rt.room_type_id = rv.room_type_id WHERE rv.reservation_id = #{reservationId}

SELECT rsh.history_id, rsh.from_status, rsh.to_status, rsh.action_type, rsh.changed_by_user_id, u.login_id AS changed_by_login_id, u.name AS changed_by_name, rsh.reason_type, rsh.reason_text, rsh.changed_at FROM reservation_status_history rsh JOIN users u ON u.user_id = rsh.changed_by_user_id WHERE rsh.reservation_id = #{reservationId} ORDER BY rsh.changed_at ASC, rsh.history_id ASC

SELECT rb.block_id, rb.room_id, r.room_code, r.room_type_id, rt.name AS room_type_name, rb.start_date, rb.end_date, rb.reason_type, rb.reason_text FROM room_blocks rb JOIN rooms r ON r.room_id = rb.room_id JOIN room_types rt ON rt.room_type_id = r.room_type_id WHERE r.accommodation_id = #{accommodationId} AND rb.status = 'ACTIVE' AND rb.start_date < #{endDate} AND rb.end_date >= #{startDate} ORDER BY rb.start_date ASC, rb.block_id ASC

SELECT pp.policy_id, pp.room_type_id, rt.name AS room_type_name, pp.policy_name, pp.start_date, pp.end_date, pp.delta_amount, pp.day_of_week_mask FROM price_policies pp JOIN room_types rt ON rt.room_type_id = pp.room_type_id WHERE pp.accommodation_id = #{accommodationId} AND pp.room_type_id = #{roomTypeId} AND pp.status = 'ACTIVE' AND pp.start_date < #{endDate} AND pp.end_date >= #{startDate} ORDER BY pp.start_date ASC, pp.policy_id ASC

SELECT rv.reservation_id, rv.reservation_no, rv.guest_user_id, rv.accommodation_id, rv.room_type_id, a.host_user_id, rv.status, rv.requested_at FROM reservations rv JOIN accommodations a ON a.accommodation_id = rv.accommodation_id WHERE rv.reservation_id = #{reservationId} FOR UPDATE

SELECT rv.reservation_id, rv.reservation_no, rv.accommodation_id, rv.room_type_id, a.host_user_id, rv.status FROM reservations rv JOIN accommodations a ON a.accommodation_id = rv.accommodation_id WHERE rv.reservation_id = #{reservationId} FOR UPDATE
